models.name: MAVL Chest X-Ray Analysis
models.name_zh: MAVL 胸部 X 光分析
models.description: Analyzes chest X-ray images to detect 75 types of thoracic findings including pneumonia, pleural effusion, cardiomegaly, pneumothorax, atelectasis, consolidation, edema, nodule, mass, and fracture using deep learning.
models.description_zh: 使用深度学习分析胸部 X 光片，检测 75 种胸部病变，包括肺炎、胸腔积液、心脏扩大、气胸、肺不张、实变、水肿、结节、肿块和骨折。

top_k.description: Number of top predictions to return
